name: Creamy Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 ½ oz) drained, tiny shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the milk and seasonings; beat again to combine.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well mixed.
4. Serve with vegetables, crackers, or other accompaniments.
Per tablespoon: 25 calories, 2g protein, 1g carbohydrates, 0g fiber, 2g fat, 12mg cholesterol, 55mg sodium, 30mg potassium, and ½ fat exchange.
